bonuses.stat: Reduces your damage taken from environmental traps by 40%.

When you deal damage, you have a 25% chance to create desecrated ground for 5 seconds, which reduces the Movement Speed of enemies within 3.5 meters by 60%, damages them for 349 Magic damage every 1 second, and heals you for 100% of the damage done. This effect can occur once every 5 seconds and the damage scales off your Max Health.
